title: Charred Light Syrian Pancetta Fried-Rice
description: An ovo-vegetarian friendly Syrian dish made with pancetta, charred to perfection and served as a light dinner.

ingredients.name: Pancetta
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality pancetta for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Rice Khao Khua
ingredients.notes: Khao Khua is a type of Thai sticky rice that works well in this dish.

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.notes: Use large eggs for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet onion for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic to release its flavors.

ingredients.name: Parsley
ingredients.notes: Fresh parsley adds a pop of color and flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use flaky sea salt for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality olive oil for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a low-sodium soy sauce for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Lime Juice
ingredients.notes: Use freshly squeezed lime juice for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Chopped Scallions
ingredients.notes: Garnish with chopped scallions for added flavor.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
